meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Zro
products.tagline: Private inference for coding agents
products.summaryZh: 编码代理的私有推理
products.descriptionZh: 在多区域基础设施上实现快速且优化的开放模型推理，零请求保留。
products.description: Fast and optimized open-model inference on multi-region infrastructure with zero request retention.

products.name: Albato AI
products.tagline: Build AI-driven workflows across 1,000+ apps
products.summaryZh: 跨1000多个应用构建AI驱动的工作流
products.descriptionZh: 使用Albato实现更智能的自动化：与Albato Copilot对话即可构建自动化流程，让AI代理根据自然语言请求执行任务。此外，通过画布模式可视化工作流，使用真实数据测试单个步骤，并轻松共享自动化方案。
products.description: Automate smarter with Albato: chat with Albato Copilot to build automations and let AI Agents execute tasks from natural language requests. Plus, visualize workflows with Canvas mode, test individual steps with real data, and share automations easily.

products.name: Codex Micro
products.tagline: Tactile controls for your Codex agents
products.summaryZh: Codex 智能体的触控操作
products.descriptionZh: Codex Micro 是与 Work Louder 合作打造的一款紧凑型键盘，用于控制你的 Codex 智能体。它配备常用技能的实体按键、调节推理级别的旋钮，以及实时 RGB 状态指示灯，让你无需切换窗口即可追踪智能体的进度。
products.description: Codex Micro is a compact keyboard built with Work Louder to control your Codex agents. It features physical keys for common skills, a dial to adjust reasoning levels, and live RGB status lights so you can track agent progress without switching windows.

products.name: River
products.tagline: AI account executives that demo and close B2B deals
products.summaryZh: AI客户经理，负责演示并完成B2B交易。
products.descriptionZh: River让B2B企业能够通过VoiceAI进行销售。当潜在客户咨询时，我们的AI客户经理会立即加入实时通话，进行产品演示、处理异议并完成成交——这样潜在客户就无需等待销售代表的日程安排。由Ramp、Kalshi和Lean的创始人支持。
products.description: River enables B2B companies to sell with VoiceAI. When a lead enquires, our AI account executive joins a live call instantly, runs the product demo, handles objections, and closes - so no lead ever waits for a rep's calendar. Backed by founders of Ramp, Kalshi, and Lean.

products.name: Nitrosend
products.tagline: Email for AI agents. They sign up, send and reply.
products.summaryZh: 面向AI代理的电子邮件服务。代理可注册、发送及回复邮件。
products.descriptionZh: Nitrosend是为AI智能体打造的全栈式邮件系统。将任意智能体指向nitrosend.com/SKILL.md，它即可自动完成注册、接入、域名绑定并开始发送邮件。现已上线：营销邮件与事务性邮件、基于自有域名的智能体专属收件箱（测试版，需申请）、以及支持人工升级的一对一客户回复。即将推出：由智能体驱动的个性化外联。正在开发：基于目标的智能体营销。人类负责审批。智能体负责执行。
products.description: Nitrosend is full-stack email built for AI agents. Point any agent at nitrosend.com/SKILL.md and it signs itself up, onboards, connects your domain and sends. Live today: marketing and transactional email, real inboxes for agents on your own domain (beta, by request), and 1-1 customer replies with human escalation. Coming soon: personalised outreach run by your agent. In development: goal-based agentic marketing. Humans approve. Agents operate.

products.name: The Eureka Database
products.tagline: Turn a Reddit complaint into your next company
products.summaryZh: 将Reddit上的投诉转化为你的下一个公司创意
products.descriptionZh: AI能轻松生成上千个创业点子，却无法告诉你哪个会有人真正买单。Eureka Database是一个从Reddit真实抱怨、评论和论坛中挖掘出的创意库。每个创意都附带证据：谁需要它、谁已盈利、以及可运行演示。通过MCP连接后，你的AI代理会为任何保存的创意提取完整构建规格：问题、技术栈、数据模式，甚至设计风格，无需提示工程。
products.description: AI will happily generate a thousand startup ideas. It can't tell you which one people will actually pay for. The Eureka Database is a library of ideas mined from real complaints on Reddit, reviews, and forums. Every idea comes with the receipts: who wants it, who's already profitable, and a working demo. Connect over MCP and your AI agent pulls the full build spec for any saved idea: the problem, the stack, the schema, even the design taste, no prompt engineering needed.

products.name: Manta AI
products.tagline: Your AI agent for autonomous web app testing
products.summaryZh: 你的AI代理，用于自主网页应用测试
products.descriptionZh: Manta AI 是一款面向 Web 应用的自主测试代理。只需提供 URL，它便会像真实用户一样探索你的应用——映射操作流程、发现缺陷，并生成可自我修复的测试用例。用自然语言描述一个流程，Manta 便会为你完成测试，无需编写脚本。当 UI 发生变化时，测试用例会自动适应。你可以在任何机器或服务器上本地运行该代理——测试位于防火墙后、私有网络内，甚至本地主机上的应用。免费套餐已开放，无需绑定银行卡。
products.description: Manta AI is an autonomous testing agent for web applications. Give it a URL and it explores your app the way a real user would — mapping flows, finding bugs, and generating self-healing test cases. Describe a flow in plain English and Manta tests it for you, no script required. When your UI changes, the tests adapt on their own. Run the agent locally on any machine or server — test apps behind a firewall, on a private network, or even on localhost. Free tier open. No card required.

products.name: Nuvio
products.tagline: Connect your X bio to your MRR and GA4 for auto updates
products.summaryZh: 将你的X简介与MRR和GA4关联，实现自动更新
products.descriptionZh: 厌倦了X个人资料中过时或手动输入的指标？Nuvio连接Stripe、Google Analytics和Search Console，自动更新个人简介和背景图，展示真实、已验证的收入和流量数据。专为希望建立信任、通过实时社交证明脱颖而出的创始人和独立开发者打造。无需手动编辑——只用真实数字证明你的进展。
products.description: Tired of outdated or hand-typed metrics in your X profile? Nuvio connects to Stripe, Google Analytics, and Search Console to auto-update your bio and banner with real, verified revenue and traffic stats. Built for founders and indie makers aiming to grow trust and stand out with live social proof. No manual edits—just authentic numbers that prove your progress.

products.name: In Parallel MCP
products.tagline: Your context, available to every agent.
products.summaryZh: 你的上下文，每个代理都可使用。
products.descriptionZh: 你已经向ChatGPT解释过公司情况，又向Claude解释过，再向Copilot解释。每次打开新对话，都得从头开始。粘贴笔记、上传文档、复制邮件往来、总结团队两周前的决定——而这些，本该是工具早已掌握的信息。Parallel的MCP服务器终结了这一切。只需连接一次，无论你打开哪个AI，它都已了解你的会议、决策和背景。直接提问就好。少些赘述，多些真相。
products.description: You've explained your company to ChatGPT. Then to Claude. Then to Copilot. Every time you open a new chat, you start from scratch. Paste the notes. Upload the document. Copy in the email thread. Summarize what your team decided two weeks ago — to a tool that could've just known it all along. In Parallel's MCP server ends that. Connect it once, and whichever AI you open already knows your meetings, decisions, and context. Just ask the question. Less prose. More truth.

products.name: dot.
products.tagline: The feedback layer for anything you build with AI.
products.summaryZh: 为任何基于AI构建的产品提供反馈层。
products.descriptionZh: dot. 是获取你构建的任何内容反馈的最快方式。粘贴任意网址，或让 Claude 创建一个审阅链接，然后分享即可。任何人点击实时页面上的任意位置即可添加评论。无需注册、无需安装扩展、无需在 Slack 中发送截图。审阅者始终免费使用。
products.description: dot. is the fastest way to get feedback on anything you build. Paste any URL, or ask Claude to create a review link, then share it. Anyone clicks anywhere on the live page to pin a comment. No signup, no extension, no screenshots in Slack. Reviewers are always free.

products.name: Graft AI
products.tagline: Turn company operations into a living map for agents
products.summaryZh: 将公司运营转化为智能体的动态地图
products.descriptionZh: 大多数代理工具假设存在干净的API。Graft从企业实际运作的地方开始：遗留应用、内部工具以及困在屏幕背后的工作流。它学习工作如何完成，将其转化为动态的操作地图，并为代理提供内置权限、审批、审计追踪和验证的稳定工具。当底层UI发生变化时，Graft能检测到偏差并修复工作流，而不会破坏代理接口。
products.description: Most agent tools assume clean APIs. Graft starts where companies actually work: legacy apps, internal tools, and workflows trapped behind screens. It learns how the work gets done, turns it into a living operational map, and gives agents stable tools with permissions, approvals, audit trails, and verification built in. When the underlying UI changes, Graft detects the drift and repairs the workflow without breaking the agent interface.

products.name: Verse
products.tagline: Build and hire autonomous AI employees from a single prompt
products.summaryZh: 从单一提示词构建并雇佣自主AI员工
products.descriptionZh: Verse 允许任何人通过单一指令构建并雇佣自主AI员工。每位员工均配备专属计算机、电子邮箱、电话号码、浏览器、钱包、加密钱包、Slack账户、身份标识、记忆系统及持续智能，可全天候独立代表您工作。您可与之对话、通话、分配任务，或将其置于共享空间——在此AI员工团队可协同合作、分派工作并共同解决复杂问题。
products.description: Verse allows anyone to build and hire autonomous AI employees from a single prompt. Every employee comes with its own computer, email inbox, phone number, browser, wallet, crypto wallet, Slack account, identity, memory, and persistent intelligence, allowing it to work independently on your behalf 24/7. Chat with them, call them, assign them tasks, or place them in shared Spaces where teams of AI employees collaborate, delegate work, and solve complex problems together.

products.name: Cito
products.tagline: Hybrid academic search over 236M papers, built for agents
products.summaryZh: 面向智能体的混合学术搜索，覆盖2.36亿篇论文
products.descriptionZh: Cito 是基于 Semantic Scholar 语料库的混合搜索引擎：关键词索引涵盖 2.36 亿篇论文，其中 1.46 亿篇配有 SPECTER2 稠密向量，通过 RRF 融合并由交叉编码器重排序。提供无需注册的免费网页搜索、简洁的 JSON API 以及原生 MCP 端点，使得 Claude Code 等智能体能够进行深度文献研究，且不受上游速率限制。构建此工具的原因是，所有学术 API 都对我的智能体进行了严格的速率限制。
products.description: Cito is a hybrid search engine over the Semantic Scholar corpus: 236M papers in the keyword index, 146M with SPECTER2 dense vectors, fused with RRF and reranked by a cross-encoder. Free web search with no signup, a plain JSON API, and a native MCP endpoint so agents like Claude Code can run deep literature research without upstream rate limits. Built because every academic API throttled my agents to death.

products.name: Weave
products.tagline: Think out loud and watch it become a living map.
products.summaryZh: 边想边说，看它变成一张活地图。
products.descriptionZh: 说出一个想法，就能看到它变成一张实时地图，随着你改变主意而重塑，并问出你没想到的问题。记录会议，回放思路如何展开，分享链接，随处导出。免费开始，无需信用卡。
products.description: Talk through an idea and watch it become a live map that reshapes as you change your mind and asks the questions you haven't thought to ask. Capture meetings, replay how a thought unfolded, share a link, export anywhere. Free to start, no card.

products.name: FlightGlitch
products.tagline: Catch mistake fares before airlines fix them
products.summaryZh: 在航空公司修正错误票价前，抢先锁定低价。
products.descriptionZh: FlightGlitch通过全天候监控航空公司的定价错误，将900美元的航班降至140美元。立即获取即时低价航班提醒。
products.description: FlightGlitch finds $900 flights for $140 by monitoring airline pricing errors 24/7. Get instant cheap flight alerts today.

products.name: ClipMatch
products.tagline: Turn your camera roll into social content with AI
products.summaryZh: 用AI将你的相册转化为社交媒体内容
products.descriptionZh: AI视频编辑器，将相机胶卷素材转化为短视频。辅助脚本撰写，通过片段匹配功能为每句台词匹配最佳镜头，并导出适用于Instagram、TikTok、YouTube Shorts或LinkedIn的社交内容——无需时间线编辑。
products.description: The AI video editor that turns camera roll footage into short-form videos. Get help with script writing, let clip matching pair each line with the right shot, and export social content for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or LinkedIn — no timeline editing.

products.name: SonOf
products.tagline: Empty your backlog. Pay only when it ships
products.summaryZh: 清空积压，发货才付。
products.descriptionZh: 连接你的代码仓库与项目管理工具。SonOf 审计代码库，编写并评估任务单，并交付你批准的内容。每项计划由资深工程师签署，每个 PR 由资深工程师审查。仅在代码上线时计费，被拒绝的工作无需付费。
products.description: Connect your repo and PM tools. SonOf audits the codebase, writes and estimates the tickets, and ships the ones you approve. A senior engineer signs every plan and reviews every PR. Billed only when code hits production. Rejected work costs $0.

products.name: PayCan
products.tagline: Open-source alternative to Stripe Checkout for vibe coders
products.summaryZh: 面向vibe开发者的Stripe Checkout开源替代方案
products.descriptionZh: 约 **10 行代码**即可为你的 SaaS 或 vibe-coded 应用实现无缝的多网关支付集成。Paycan 是一个自托管、与供应商无关的结账系统。在 Stripe 与 PayPal 之间轻松切换，零锁定、无需复杂 webhook，享有绝对自由。
products.description: Seamless, multi-gateway payment integration for your SaaS or vibe-coded app in **around 10 lines of code**. Paycan is a self-hosted, vendor-agnostic checkout system. Switch between Stripe & PayPal effortlessly with zero lock-in, no complex webhooks, and absolute freedom.

products.name: Paradigm
products.tagline: Turn any goal into a personalized, adaptive learning path.
products.summaryZh: 将任何目标转化为个性化、自适应学习路径。
products.descriptionZh: Paradigm 围绕个人重新构想教育，将任何学习目标转化为一条随你的进步而演变的渐进路径，帮助你稳步从好奇走向精通，而不会迷失方向。
products.description: Paradigm reimagines education around the individual, taking any learning goal and turning it into a step-by-step path that evolves with your progress, helping you move steadily from curiosity to mastery without getting lost.

products.name: Amami
products.tagline: Analytics that lives inside your AI assistant
products.summaryZh: 内置于AI助手中的分析功能
products.descriptionZh: 我开发 Amami 是因为厌倦了在 Cursor 和浏览器标签页之间来回切换，只为查看网站访问量。Amami 是一款隐私优先的分析工具，原生支持 MCP——你只需直接问 Codex/Claude“我的流量怎么样？”，就能在不离开编辑器的情况下获得答案和建议。无需 Cookie，无需同意横幅，脚本小于 2KB。现在就开始使用吧！
products.description: I built Amami because I was tired of tab-switching between Cursor and a browser tab just to check how many people visited my site. Amami is privacy-first analytics with native MCP support — you literally ask Codex/Claude "how's my traffic?" and get answers + recommendations without leaving your editor. No cookies, no consent banners, <2KB script. Start to use it now !
